---
name: Feedback / Suggestion
about: Share your thoughts, ideas, or report a usability issue
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

**Type of feedback** (select one):
- [ ] General impression
- [ ] Feature suggestion
- [ ] Bug report
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other

**Describe your feedback**  
A clear and concise description of what you'd like to share or suggest.

**If this is a bug report, please include:**
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected behavior
- Actual behavior
- Screenshots or console logs (if applicable)

**Additional context**  
Add any other context, references, or examples.
